title: Main program line
description: Increase the main program limit by 1 line.

title: Bucket values x2
description: Double bucket points. Can be bought up to 6 times.

title: Ball preview boost
description: Show the next 3 balls at once.

title: Center bucket bonus
description: 'center_ball' earns +5 extra points in the center bucket.

title: Helper editor lines
description: Increase the helper editor limit by 2 lines.

title: Portal chain
description: Balls created by a portal split can split one more time if they hit a portal.
